title: TRAPPED REALITY - Short Stories from Moscow
description:
TRAPPED REALITY
Short Stories from Moscow 30:58
October 1997

Events I stumbled into.

The Short Stories from Moscow are mental exercises on art, on the happenstances of daily life and on the identity of
man in the streets of Moscow. In Russia there is too much of everything: too much sky, too much earth, to much beauty...

camera: Juri Burak

editing: Sándor Gréczi

directed by Jürg Da Vaz

filmed on site in Moscow

a handmade Da Vaz production© 1998
